summary: Complete e2e testing of Menu Automation app - all backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly
seed_data_creation: Created test status checks via /api/status POST endpoint during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. Backend APIs: /api/ (root), /api/health, /api/datasets/stats, /api/status (POST/GET) all return correct responses. Frontend displays status dashboard with green pills, cards, and dataset breakdown table. No issues found.
backend_tests_passed: test_root_returns_message - /api/ returns Menu Automation API message
test_health_returns_ok - /api/health returns status ok with mongo ok
test_create_and_verify_status_persistence - Status check persists in MongoDB
frontend_tests_passed: Backend card shows service and port 8001
Datasets card shows 33 total files and 7 batches
Dataset breakdown table with all 7 batch entries
